goal: build a local markdown knowledge base search tool
purpose: Validate local document indexing, search artifact creation, verification, and final reporting.
expected_capabilities: Indexes local markdown files without network access.
Provides a CLI search path for keyword queries.
Writes durable index and usage artifacts.
Verifies a keyword search against fixture content.
acceptance: markdown_kb.py exists and supports directory plus keyword arguments.
kb_index.json contains both fixture markdown files.
Final report lists search artifacts and cost summary.
recommended_command: agent /run "build a local markdown knowledge base search tool" --root <workspace>
